name: braintrust
description: Braintrust — evidence-graded user research for Claude Code. Grade scattered research with a calibrated Mom Test lens, then pressure-test product ideas against it. Zero backend.

plugins.name: braintrust
plugins.description: Turn scattered user research into an evidence-graded running analysis (setup → ingest → ask), then check any idea against real user signal. Surfaces where the judge is unsure and where weak signals converge, for you to judge in context.
